folio.label: 189v
folio.l: Of contekã and of waspes , grete and lyte
Rigút as the humour , of malencolie
Causetú many a man , in sleep~ to crie
For fere of Blake Beres , or Booles blake
Or elles blake deueles , æ wole hem take
Of othere humours , coude I telle also
That werken many a man , in sleep~ ful woo
But I wol passe , as ligútly as I can
Lo Catou~ whicú , æ was so wys a man
Seide he nat thus , ne do no fors of dremes
Now sire q¶ she , whan we flee fro theise bemes
For goddes loue , as take som laxatyf
Vp ¹il of my soule , and of my lyf
I counseil yow the beste , I wol nat lye
That bothe of colour , and of malencolie
ñe purge ©ow and for ©e shuln nat tarie
Thougú in this toun , is noon Appotocarie
I shal my self , to herbes techen ©ow
That shal be for ©oure ese , & for ©oure prow
And in oure ©erd , the Erbes shal I fynde
The whicú han , of here ¸prete , by kynde
To purgen ©ow bynethe , and eke a boue
Sire for©ete nat this , for goddes loue
ñe ben ful colerik , of complexioun
War that the sonne , in his assencioun
Ne fynde ©ow nat replet , of humours hote
And if it do , I dar wel leye a grote
That ©e shuln han , a feuere terciane
Or an agu , whicú æ may be ©oure bane
A day or two , ©e shuln han degestyues
Of wormes , or ©e take ©oure laxatyues
Of lauriol , centaure , and fumetere
Or elles of ellebor , that growetú there
Of Catapuce , or of gait Rys beries
Of herbe yue , growyng in oure ©erd æäe merie is
Pikke he~ rigút as they growe , and ete hem In
Betú merie housbonde for ©oure fader kyn
Dredetú no dreem , I can sey ©ow no more
¢ Madame q¶ he , gund mercy of ©oure lore
But nathelees , as touchyng´ daun Catoun
That hatú of wysdom , swicú a gret renoun
Thougú æ he bad , no dremes for to drede
By god men moun , in olde bookes rede
Of many a man , more of auctoritee
